newsItems.title: ILA 2026 – The Price of Success – When Orbit Becomes a Problem -Space Debris, Liability and Cleanup
newsItems.description: At ILA 2026, ESA's Dr. Holger Krag, DLR's Dr. Manuel Metz and BHO Legal's Katharina Prall join Space.Table's Nicola Kuhrt to confront the space-debris challenge — the scale of the threat, who's liable, and how mitigation, active removal and new law can keep our orbits usable.
